title: I sold goods worth Rs. 5000 for cash today
content:
PHASE 3 NLU — language_type=english
User input: I sold goods worth 5000 rupees for cash today
Corrected: I sold goods worth Rs. 5000 for cash today
Meaning: Cash sale of goods for Rs.5000
Intent: record_cash_sale
Category: cash_sale
Confidence: 0.95
Clarification needed: False
Journal hint: Dr Cash in Hand 5000 / Cr Sales Revenue 5000; also reduce Inventory and increase COGS by cost value
source: Nepal NLU Phase 3 Language Dataset (AI Training)

title: Received Rs.10000 from customer via bank transfer
content:
PHASE 3 NLU — language_type=english
User input: Received 10000 from customer via bank transfer
Corrected: Received Rs.10000 from customer via bank transfer
Meaning: Bank receipt from customer, likely settling a due amount
Intent: record_receipt
Category: customer_payment_collection
Confidence: 0.75
Clarification needed: True
Clarify ask: Is this against an existing due (accounts receivable) or a new advance/sale? Which customer?
Journal hint: Dr Bank Account 10000 / Cr Accounts Receivable 10000 (assumed against due)
source: Nepal NLU Phase 3 Language Dataset (AI Training)

title: I paid the same supplier twice by mistake, please check
content:
PHASE 3 NLU — language_type=english
User input: i pay two time by mistake to same supplier check please

Category: duplicate_payment_check

Clarification needed: True
Clarify ask: Can you provide both payment dates, amounts, and reference numbers so the duplicate can be identified and reversed if confirmed?
Journal hint: Do not post until duplicate is confirmed; flag for reversal review
source: Nepal NLU Phase 3 Language Dataset (AI Training)

Clarification needed: True
Clarify ask: Can you confirm the exact sale amount instead of an approximation?
Journal hint: Dr Cash in Hand ~5000 / Cr Sales Revenue ~5000 (pending exact confirmation)
